top_signals.title: Chicago Fed National Activity Index Rebounds
top_signals.summary: The Chicago Fed National Activity Index (CFNAI) rose to +0.14 in April 2026 from a revised –0.15 in March, marking its strongest reading since March 2025. top_signals.title: New global assessment maps infrastructure pathways to scale sustainable maritime fuels
top_signals.summary: A new report from the Lloyd’s Register Maritime Decarbonisation Hub (The Decarb Hub) finds that early investment in a small number of strategically positioned hubs and export gateways could accelerate the availability and uptake of sustainable maritime fuels. top_signals.title: Fuel Switch Snapshot: B100 and LBM discounts narrow in Rotterdam
